title: API Gateway Outage — June 2026
summary: Elevated 503 errors on the public API gateway persisted for 47 minutes during peak traffic. Customer-facing dashboards and mobile clients were affected. On-call engineering rolled back a cache configuration change and restored service.

timeline.event: Pager triggered: error rate > 5% on api-gateway
Incident bridge opened; SRE and platform joined
Identified connection pool saturation after cache flush
Rollback deployed; error rate returning to baseline

root_cause: Connection pool limits were insufficient for post-cache-flush connection burst. Auto-scaling lagged behind traffic spike.

actions.title: Raise pool ceiling and add burst headroom
Add cache warm-up before flush in deploy pipeline

evidence: Slack #incidents thread and Grafana dashboard snapshots archived in ticket INC-2026-0611.
